JUDGE MASON, M.NORMAN/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS CAROL SALVAGIONE DEFENDANT IS IN PRO PER 11:25AM CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT FOR IN LIMINE MOTIONS. 11:43AM COURT TAKES IN LIMINE MOTIONS UNDER SUBMISSION. A PANEL OF 45 PEOPLE IS ORDERED FOR TUESDAY, SEPT 19 1995 @ 09:30AM. PANEL IS TO REMAIN IN JURY ROOM UNTIL REQUESTED TO REPORT TO DEPARTMENT. CASE CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 19, 1995 @ 09:00AM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1855 HYDE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $950.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $950.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
